page: Microsoft Azure M96-48bds_2_v3 is a memory-optimized server belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 48 vCPUs, 24 physical cores, and a 105 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 1946.0 GB of system memory, yielding 40.54 GB of RAM per core, and includes 4608 GB of local storage.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates strong memory performance, with uncached read-only large block memory bandwidth reaching 301.98 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 156.64 GB/sec. Single-core and multi-core CPU performance via stress-ng falls within the average range, while Geekbench single-core scores and image processing benchmarks rank in the top tier. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), which contribute to strong performance in extended instruction tests and cryptography.

The server's high memory-to-vCPU ratio and local storage capacity make it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring massive memory footprints relative to compute cores. However, the trade-off includes average multi-core CPU scaling relative to its massive memory capacity. It is suitable for large-scale database operations, in-memory caching systems like Redis, and memory-intensive data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure M96-48bds_2_v3 is a memory-optimized server from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, featuring a dedicated 48-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. It is configured with 1946.0 GB of RAM, providing 40.54 GB of memory per core, alongside 4608 GB of local storage. The server delivers strong memory bandwidth, with uncached read-only large block speeds of 301.98 GB/sec, and top-tier Geekbench single-core performance. While multi-core CPU performance sits in the average range, the hardware excels in memory-bound operations and database workloads. Supported by Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512, this configuration is designed for memory-intensive applications, large-scale database operations, and Redis caching systems.

tagline: A memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM capacity, dedicated Intel Xeon processing, and high-speed local storage for data-intensive workloads.

1946.0 GB of RAM providing 40.54 GB of memory per core
4608 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong memory bandwidth and top-tier Geekbench single-core performance
Suitable for large-scale database operations and Redis caching systems
